name: Ogudomon

signature_move.name: Catedral
signature_move.description: Produces a shock wave from its "mouth".

description: Ogudomon is a grotesque Super Demon Lord who has seven legs and eyes, as well as an eighth eye. As it includes the whole of the Digital World 's sins, and moreover, is a mysterious personification with the ability to atone for them all, the power of a Digimon with even a small amount of malice is counterbalanced, and it is impossible for it to defeat Ogudomon. Its Special Moves are running wild after its own lusts ( Oratio Grandioloqua ), and a shock-wave played from its mouth ( Catedral ). Also, it pulverizes its opponent with its gigantic legs ( Gradus ).
